title: ProtocolCodeRegistry
description: Machine-readable schema for protocol code registry files.

code.description: Stable machine-consumed code value within the registry namespace.

summary.description: Human-readable summary describing the semantics of the code value.

registryCode.description: Documented code entry inside the registry.

registry_name.description: Protocol field name or concept owning this registry.

namespace.description: Stable namespace prefix for machine-consumed codes in this registry.

documentation_owner.description: Documentation owner for the registry contents.

description.description: Human-readable description of the registry scope.

codes.description: Documented code entries defined by this registry.
